source.title: ANF06. Fathers of the Third Century: Gregory Thaumaturgus, Dionysius the Great, Julius Africanus, Anatolius, and Minor Writers, Methodius, Arnobius

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: And after the flood, Sem begot Arphaxad.

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: Arphaxad, when 135 years old, begets Sala in the year 2397.

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: Sala, when 130 years old, begets Heber in the year 2527.

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: Heber, when 134 years old, begets Phalec in the year 2661, so called because the earth was divided in his days.

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: Phalec, when 130 years old, begot Ragan, and after living other 209 years died.
